scripts.deploy:fns: pnpm --filter functions build && pnpm dlx firebase-tools deploy --only functions
scripts.native:deploy:prod: cd apps/native && pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --platform ios --profile production --local --output ../../builds/Dinomay.ipa && pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest submit --platform ios --profile production --path ../../builds/Dinomay.ipa
